allow: Bash(mysql -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS dash_comercial CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash(mysql -u root dash_comercial -e "SELECT \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM clients\) clients, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM opportunities\) opps, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM goals\) goals, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM monthly_stats\) stats, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users\) users;")
